title: A survey of okayish ASI futures
summary: A survey of okayish ASI futures
whyItMatters: At this point, RSI loops and continual learning appear overwhelmingly likely to begin in the near future. Whatever the limit of the LLM paradigm plus whatever new, superior paradigms a maximally intelligent LLM can develop, we are on track to do so in the next few years. There remain substantial obstacles to wild superintelligence, but AI is already superhu…
